since.description: Window start (unix epoch seconds). Default: now - 24 hours.

until.description: Window end (unix epoch seconds). Default: now.

heuristics.description: Which heuristics to run. Closed set — see §29.5.

actor.description: Restrict to one actor. Default: all actors (this is an ops tool — §29.5).

submit_flood_threshold.description: submit_flood: flag if one actor exceeds this many submits within 60 minutes.

submit_age_min_sec.description: stale_pending: minimum age (seconds before `until`) a submit must have before being flagged stale. Prevents brand-new submits from appearing as stale.
